name: Banana Split Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 can crushed pineapple (12 oz.), drained well
recipeInstructions:
1. Press Graham cracker crumbs into the bottom of a 9-inch pie pan.
2. Mix melted margarine and sugar with the crumbs until combined.
3. Bake at 425°F for 5 minutes, then cool completely.
4. Prepare filling: Blend cream cheese and confectioner's sugar until smooth.
5. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the crust.
6. Arrange sliced bananas on top of the cream cheese layer.
7. Cover the bananas with the crushed pineapple.
8. Add Cool Whip and sprinkle cherries on top.
9. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
